source_snippet: mk: wait i thought we're doing interflect
claim: Interflect is the active project identity, not Interspect.

source_snippet: please don't silently rewrite canon from these lessons
claim: Interflect proposals must be reviewable before canon mutation.

source_snippet: bd create succeeded but auto-export git add failed
claim: Treat Beads mutation success separately from auto-export warnings.

source_snippet: agent repeatedly routed UI QA to terminal logs
claim: UI visual bugs should route to browser QA when snapshots are insufficient.

source_snippet: follow up by creating an implementation bead
claim: Create a Beads follow-up for the Interflect v0 scaffold.

source_snippet: untracked scripts/__pycache__/ exists right now
claim: A one-time pycache directory is present in the current worktree.

source_snippet: terse Discord please
claim: mk prefers terse Discord status updates.

source_snippet: Always verify repo-local Beads authority before creating issues.
claim: Project work should verify repo-local Beads authority before issue creation.

source_snippet: Use execute_code argv arrays when shell backticks corrupt notes.
claim: Use argv-array subprocess calls for Markdown-heavy Beads notes.

source_snippet: fd-safety missed SQL injection findings twice
claim: Safety review agent underperformed on SQL injection findings.

source_snippet: Need a follow-up to document the promotion taxonomy.
claim: File follow-up work to document the promotion taxonomy.

source_snippet: Current date is 2026-05-03.
claim: The runtime date during this session was 2026-05-03.

source_snippet: FLUX is Flux Review Substack, not GSV.
claim: FLUX refers to Flux Review Substack, not GSV.

source_snippet: Hermes integration is provisional adapter; Sylveste is canonical destination.
claim: Hermes integration should be treated as provisional when Sylveste is the canonical home.

source_snippet: Don't retry exact blocked bundle; split probes after timeout.
claim: After a blocked closeout bundle, split verification into narrow probes.

source_snippet: codex gave better design synthesis than claude -p
claim: Codex should be considered for design synthesis when Claude Code deflects.

source_snippet: Create bead to add command-boundary tests for /sprint.
claim: Create follow-up bead for Hermes /sprint command-boundary tests.

source_snippet: port 9119 is currently listening.
claim: Port 9119 was listening during the check.

source_snippet: Names from Banks/Reynolds are welcome when they fit.
claim: mk likes fitting proper-noun references from Banks/Reynolds and adjacent SF canons.

source_snippet: Interflect proposes promotions; Interspect profiles agent performance.
claim: Interflect owns lesson promotion proposals while Interspect owns performance profiling.
